title: Config Intermediary
description: An intermediate api for interacting with various config libraries.
body:
Config Intermediary is a library designed for interacting with Fabric's multitude of config libraries.

Config Intermediary currently supports the following libraries:
- Auto Config (Cloth Config)
- oωo-config (oωo)

Config Intermediary also has specific support for the following mods:
- Configured (Config Intermediary will use Configured to generate automatic configuration screens for mods that use the above libraries that don't already provide their own configuration screens; Config Intermediary does not currently have a compatibility layer with SimpleConfig, Configured's builtin config api.)
- Mod Menu (Mod Menu has a built in config which is supported by Config Intermediary)
